case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A VS. JUSTIN HUNT

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNT, JUSTIN $10,529.59 PRINCIPAL, $429.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,959.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100080549)
ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. (SEE SCANNED ORDER)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 75317069) FILED BY ATTORNEY HUNT, MICHAEL SCOTT

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO JUNE-09-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT. WHEN THE CLERK CONTACTED THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT TO INQUIRE, THE CLERK WAS TOLD THAT THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT DID NOT RECEIVE THE AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING. MOVING PARTY MUST RE-NOTICE THE HEARING AND MUST SERVE THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT WITH THE NOTICE. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The claim of exemption is granted in part. The levying officer shall garnish $125 from each future pay bimonthly pay period until the judgment is paid. The levying officer shall release $3838.80 held to the judgment creditor.

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Continued To Nov-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Continued to November 17, 2025. The claim was untimely calendared on two court day notice.

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/DH)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The court did not receive the claim of exemption from the Sheriff's Department. When the clerk contacted the Sheriff's Department to inquire, the clerk was told that the Sheriff's Department did not receive the amended notice of hearing. Moving party must re-notice the hearing and must serve the Sheriff's Department with the notice.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
